subject: [RELEASE] Release guilin xtesting docker

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

The first image's "guilin" version was not found. 
Also, I would recommend not combining release files with other file changes. 
That way we reduce risks on releasing something that is going to change anyways.. but that is just me. ..

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> (1 comment)
> 
> The first image's "guilin" version was not found. 
> Also, I would recommend not combining release files with other file changes. 
> That way we reduce risks on releasing something that is going to change anyways.. but that is just me. ..

OK I need to fix first the build of the guilin docker that used to work until the pbr upstream change
once done and all the guilin docker available..it could work

I am not sure to understand your statement on combining files with other files?
you mean I need to create 1 file per docker?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > (1 comment)
> > 
> > The first image's "guilin" version was not found. 
> > Also, I would recommend not combining release files with other file changes. 
> > That way we reduce risks on releasing something that is going to change anyways.. but that is just me. ..
> 
> OK I need to fix first the build of the guilin docker that used to work until the pbr upstream change
> once done and all the guilin docker available..it could work
> 
> I am not sure to understand your statement on combining files with other files?
> you mean I need to create 1 file per docker?

Not a docker per file.. sorry, I meant 1 Gerrit change for your releases/1.7.0-container.yaml file and a separate Gerrit change for the version.properties. 

Is just to have the releases file changes isolated from any changes..

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1:
> > 
> > > Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> > > 
> > > (1 comment)
> > > 
> > > The first image's "guilin" version was not found. 
> > > Also, I would recommend not combining release files with other file changes. 
> > > That way we reduce risks on releasing something that is going to change anyways.. but that is just me. ..
> > 
> > OK I need to fix first the build of the guilin docker that used to work until the pbr upstream change
> > once done and all the guilin docker available..it could work
> > 
> > I am not sure to understand your statement on combining files with other files?
> > you mean I need to create 1 file per docker?
> 
> Not a docker per file.. sorry, I meant 1 Gerrit change for your releases/1.7.0-container.yaml file and a separate Gerrit change for the version.properties. 
> 
> Is just to have the releases file changes isolated from any changes..

ok got it thanks
